image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about insulin resistance.
Context visual: Insulin resistance is when your cells stop responding to insulin effectively. This can lead to high blood sugar.
Escalation visual: But it’s not just about sugar. It can affect your energy, mood, and even weight gain.
Evidence visual: Studies show that lifestyle changes can improve insulin sensitivity. Exercise and diet are key.
Payoff visual: Understanding this can help you take control of your health. Are you ready to make a change?
Cta visual: Follow for more science-backed health insights!
